title: Pursue God Before You Pursue Her
caption:
The man who needs a woman already can't be one.

Desperation has a smell. She feels it before you say a word — not because she's cruel, but because she's looking for someone planted, not grasping.

The secret is order. "Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33. Not as a formula. As a structure: the man who has God first doesn't beg for what comes next.

Your twenties are not a waiting room. They're a forge. What you build in this season — the discipline, the faithfulness, the fear of God — is what she walks into. If you spend it looking for her, you might find her. You'll just show up empty-handed.

Become the man first. Trust Him with the rest.

—

Comment "first" and I'll send you the link.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #relationships #christian #scripture #marriage
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
